changes.reason: Adds a distinct high-value canonical troubleshooting cluster for system Camera, front/back camera, flash/flashlight, permission, temperature, and service-boundary failures. Existing WeChat article covers a third-party-app subcase only.

queries: 第三方 App 调用相机失败
cookbook rg 相机 闪光 手电筒 camera flash black screen
canonicalReview.notes: Matched articles are adjacent but not duplicates: WeChat article is scoped to one third-party app path; Face ID covers TrueDepth authentication; audio covers microphone/speaker; black-screen article covers device power/display. No existing canonical article covers Apple Camera App black screen/blur, front-back camera isolation, flash/flashlight testing, temperature-disablement, and service escalation together.
